subject: [PATCH nfs-utils v2 03/16] exportfs: remove obsolete legacy mode documentation from manpage

2026-03-30.patch_summary: This patch removes outdated documentation from the exportfs manpage regarding a 'legacy mode' that was used in Linux kernels prior to version 3.1. The legacy mode, which involved injecting exports directly into the kernel using the nfsservctl() syscall, has been obsolete since then and is no longer supported by nfs-utils. The patch simplifies the description of exportfs behavior and removes references to this outdated feature.
